# Implementation Plan: Full CFOP Algorithm Grids

**Branch**: `008-full-cfop-grids` | **Date**: 2026-03-08 | **Spec**: [spec.md](./spec.md)
**Input**: Feature specification from `/specs/008-full-cfop-grids/spec.md`

**Note**: This document is generated by the `/speckit.plan` command. See `.specify/templates/plan-template.md` for the execution workflow.

## Summary

Add full F2L (41 cases), OLL (57 cases), and PLL (21 cases) algorithm reference pages to cfop-app with expandable/collapsible section UX and navigation between all four CFOP method pages (2LK, F2L, OLL, PLL). OLL will use 7 consolidated balanced groups applied directly to JSON data. Pages will display algorithm cards with cube state images and notation in responsive grids without interactive features.

## Technical Context

**Language/Version**: TypeScript 5.x, React 19+  
**Primary Dependencies**: React, React Router, Bulma CSS, Vite (build system)  
**Storage**: Local JSON files for algorithm data (algs-cfop-f2l.json, algs-cfop-oll.json, algs-cfop-pll.json), localStorage for section state (session-only)  
**Testing**: Vitest (unit), Cypress (e2e)  
**Target Platform**: Web (responsive: mobile-first via iPhone 16 baseline ~393px, desktop support), iOS via Capacitor  
**Project Type**: Web application (single-page with client-side routing)  
**Performance Goals**: Initial page load <2s on mobile, section expand <300ms, "Expand All" <2s  
**Constraints**: Must maintain responsive grid on mobile, no server-side rendering required, offline-capable via static hosting  
**Scale/Scope**: 4 pages total, 119 algorithm cases, ~20 case groups across all pages

## Constitution Check

*GATE: Must pass before Phase 0 research. Re-check after Phase 1 design.*

### ✅ Educational Focus
**Status**: PASS  
**Evaluation**: Feature directly supports learning full CFOP method by providing organized reference pages for F2L, OLL, and PLL algorithms. Expandable sections reduce cognitive load while maintaining comprehensive coverage.

### ✅ Open Source & Accessibility
**Status**: PASS  
**Evaluation**: No paywalls, no premium features. All algorithm data and images remain freely accessible. Responsive design ensures mobile accessibility.

### ✅ Technical Excellence
**Status**: PASS  
**Evaluation**: Uses modern React 19+ with TypeScript, maintains web standards via semantic HTML and CSS, follows existing cfop-app architecture patterns. Client-side routing for deep linking and browser history.

### ✅ Content Ownership
**Status**: PASS  
**Evaluation**: CFOP algorithms are publicly available knowledge. No proprietary content being copied. Using existing JSON data structure maintained in repository.

### ✅ Technology Choices
**Status**: PASS  
**Evaluation**: Follows React 19+/TypeScript/Vite stack. Continues Bulma CSS usage. Algorithm data maintained in JSON with symlinks to shared-data. cubing.js not required for this feature (display-only reference pages).

### ✅ Scope Limitations
**Status**: PASS  
**Evaluation**: Feature stays within CFOP learning scope. No social features, no user accounts, no monetization. Adds reference pages for advanced CFOP stages (F2L, OLL, PLL) as logical extension of existing 2LK page.

### ✅ Code Quality
**Status**: PASS (with Phase 1 verification)  
**Evaluation**: TypeScript ensures type safety. Testing via Vitest + Cypress. Component reuse from existing AlgorithmCard and grid patterns. Will verify clean architecture in Phase 1.

### ✅ User Experience
**Status**: PASS  
**Evaluation**: Expandable sections address cognitive load. Navigation menu provides intuitive hierarchy. Responsive grid maintains usability on mobile. Consistent card design across pages.

### ✅ Performance Requirements
**Status**: PASS (with Phase 0 verification)  
**Evaluation**: Success criteria define measurable performance targets (<2s load, <300ms expand). Will verify bundle size impact and rendering efficiency in Phase 0 research.

### ✅ Architecture Decisions
**Status**: PASS  
**Evaluation**: Component-based React architecture maintained. React hooks for state management. localStorage for session-only expand/collapse state. No server requirements.

### ✅ Deployment Strategy
**Status**: PASS  
**Evaluation**: Static hosting compatible. No new server-side dependencies. Works offline once cached. Capacitor compatibility maintained.

### ✅ Maintenance Approach
**Status**: PASS  
**Evaluation**: Feature documented via spec.md (Feature 008). Clear separation: routing logic, page components, shared card components. OLL consolidation applied directly to JSON reduces runtime complexity.

**Overall Gate Status**: ✅ **PASS** - All constitution principles satisfied. No violations requiring justification.

```text
specs/008-full-cfop-grids/
├── plan.md              # This file (/speckit.plan command output)

```

### Source Code (repository root)

```text
cfop-app/
├── public/
│   ├── data/
│   │   ├── algs-cfop-bgr.json       # Existing (2LK beginner)
│   │   ├── algs-cfop-f2l.json       # Existing (to be consumed by F2L page)
│   │   ├── algs-cfop-oll.json       # Existing (TO BE MODIFIED: group labels consolidated)
│   │   └── algs-cfop-pll.json       # Existing (to be consumed by PLL page)
│   └── assets/
│       ├── cfop_bgr/                # Existing (2LK images)
│       ├── cfop_f2l/                # Existing (F2L images)
│       ├── cfop_oll/                # Existing (OLL images)
│       └── cfop_pll/                # Existing (PLL images)
├── src/
│   ├── components/
│   │   ├── AlgorithmCard.tsx        # Existing (to be reused)
│   │   ├── AlgorithmGroupSection.tsx    # NEW: Expandable section wrapper
│   │   ├── ExpandCollapseControls.tsx   # NEW: "Expand All"/"Collapse All" buttons
│   │   ├── CfopPageLayout.tsx           # NEW: Shared layout for F2L/OLL/PLL pages
│   │   └── CfopNavigation.tsx           # NEW: Navigation menu component
│   ├── pages/
│   │   ├── BGRPage.tsx              # Existing (2LK page, currently App.tsx)
│   │   ├── F2LPage.tsx              # NEW: F2L algorithm grid
│   │   ├── OLLPage.tsx              # NEW: OLL algorithm grid with 7 groups
│   │   └── PLLPage.tsx              # NEW: PLL algorithm grid
│   ├── hooks/
│   │   └── useSectionToggle.ts      # NEW: Manage expand/collapse state
│   ├── types/
│   │   └── cfop-types.ts            # Existing (Algorithm, AlgorithmData types)
│   ├── App.tsx                      # TO BE MODIFIED: Add routing
│   └── main.tsx                     # Existing (entry point)
└── tests/
    ├── unit/
    │   ├── AlgorithmGroupSection.test.tsx   # NEW
    │   ├── ExpandCollapseControls.test.tsx  # NEW
    │   └── useSectionToggle.test.ts         # NEW
    └── e2e/
        ├── navigation.cy.ts         # NEW: Test page routing
        └── section-toggle.cy.ts     # NEW: Test expand/collapse UX
```

**Structure Decision**: Single web application structure. New page components added to `src/pages/` for F2L, OLL, PLL. Shared components extracted to `src/components/` for section UX and navigation. Routing configured in `App.tsx`. Existing 2LK page (currently `App.tsx` content) will be refactored to `BGRPage.tsx` component with routing wrapper.
